center.name: 南俄羅斯
center.summary: 南俄羅斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括高原岩鹨，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The altai accentor breeds in mountainous regions from southern Russia (Altai eastward to the mountains east of Lake Baikal) and northwestern Mongolia southward to the Tien Shan, Pamir, and northeastern Afghanistan

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The altai accentor breeds in mountainous regions from southern Russia (Altai eastward to the mountains east of Lake Baikal) and northwestern Mongolia southward to the Tien Shan, Pamir, and northeastern Afghanistan
